exampleSentences: Tuần sau em sẽ phải thi tiếng Anh ở trường.
Chị cảm thấy lo lắng mỗi lần chuẩn bị thi cuối kỳ.
Anh đã học rất chăm chỉ để thi đạt kết quả tốt.
notes:
thi means to take an exam or an exam itself. It’s used for school exams and big official exams.

As a verb, it goes with subjects, schools, or competitions.  

As a noun, you’ll hear kỳ thi (exam period), bài thi (test paper), and thi cử (the whole exam system/process).

It also means to compete in contests, not just school.  
Close word: kiểm tra = a smaller test; thi usually feels more serious or formal.

definitions.en: to take an exam or test.
definitions.vi: tham gia một kỳ thi hoặc kiểm tra.

example.vi: Tôi sẽ thi vào tháng tới.
example.es: Voy a presentar el examen el próximo mes.
example.en: I will take the exam next month.

translation.en: I have to take an exam on Monday.

exampleSentencesTranslated: Next week I will have an English exam at school.
She feels nervous every time she prepares for the final exam.
He studied very hard to get a good result in the exam.
notes_md:
**thi** means **to take an exam** or **an exam** itself. It’s used for school exams and big official exams.

As a **verb**, it goes with subjects, schools, or competitions.  

As a **noun**, you’ll hear **kỳ thi** (exam period), **bài thi** (test paper), and **thi cử** (the whole exam system/process).

It also means **to compete** in contests, not just school.  
Close word: **kiểm tra** = a smaller test; **thi** usually feels more serious or formal.

translation.en: I have to take an exam on Monday.
